home.title: Connecting Local Skills with Local Opportunities
home.subtitle: Advertise your skills or find someone to help with work in your local community.
home.disclaimer: Overberg Skills Connect is a noticeboard only. We do not employ, vet or recommend anyone. Please carry out your own checks before entering into any agreement.

footer.tagline: Connecting Local Skills with Local Opportunities

about.title: About
about.p1: Overberg Skills Connect is a simple digital community noticeboard that helps people in the Overberg connect. People looking for work can advertise their skills, and people looking for help can browse local profiles.
about.p2: The platform is provided by Khulisa Group. Khulisa Group only provides the technology — it is not an employment agency, recruitment company, labour broker, vetting organisation, payment platform, employer or guarantor of any user.
about.p3: Users are responsible for carrying out their own checks before entering into any arrangement. Please read our Terms of Use, Privacy Policy and Disclaimer.

advertise.skillsHelp: You can select more than one skill. If your skill is not listed, choose
and tell us what you do.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: For questions about Overberg Skills Connect, please get in touch.
